candidates.basis: DoMINO-style point/query outputs may be order equivariant only if query order is semantically pure and outputs are query-indexed.
candidates.decision_reason: Admissible only after official API confirms query order is not semantically meaningful.

execution_gate.reason: No raw production outputs or metric ledgers exist yet; Admissible only after official API confirms query order is not semantically meaningful.

candidates.output_mapping: Inverse-permute follow-up query outputs to source query order.
preconditions: Output rows correspond one-to-one to query rows

candidates.basis: Mirroring a production external-aero point cloud can alter geometry, normals, flow direction, or conditioning metadata.
candidates.decision_reason: Keep as OOD/domain-violation stress until geometry and conditioning symmetry are established.

execution_gate.reason: No raw production outputs or metric ledgers exist yet; Keep as OOD/domain-violation stress until geometry and conditioning symmetry are established.

candidates.metric: mapped query-field relative L2 and coefficient drift if available
candidates.output_mapping: Reflect query coordinates and vector outputs; compare mapped scalar/vector fields.
preconditions: Geometry and flow metadata are exactly symmetric

candidates.basis: Surface/volume predictions may support flux diagnostics, but the operator contract does not guarantee exact conservation without reference data and integration geometry.
candidates.decision_reason: Requires official output semantics, integration weights, and numerical floor calibration.

execution_gate.reason: No raw production outputs or metric ledgers exist yet; Requires official output semantics, integration weights, and numerical floor calibration.

candidates.output_mapping: Map source/follow-up query outputs into a common physical coordinate/integration frame.
preconditions: Integration geometry or sampling weights are available

candidates.basis: If DoMINO is accessed through a container/API, request schema, authentication, batching, and preprocessing are part of the SUT contract.
candidates.decision_reason: Schema/API-changing requests are invalid exact MRs and must fail closed.

execution_gate.reason: No raw production outputs or metric ledgers exist yet; Schema/API-changing requests are invalid exact MRs and must fail closed.

candidates.output_mapping: No numeric mapping until request/response schema and metadata preservation are verified.

candidates.basis: Estimate relation-specific floating-point/operator floor from repeated production inference before assigning tolerances.
candidates.decision_reason: Numerical floor cannot be calibrated before official runtime and raw repeated outputs exist.

execution_gate.reason: No raw production outputs or metric ledgers exist yet; Numerical floor cannot be calibrated before official runtime and raw repeated outputs exist.

candidates.metric: repeat-run relative L2 / max absolute difference by output channel
candidates.output_mapping: Compare repeated source-output tensors or surface fields in the model's native output schema.
preconditions: At least two repeated source inferences can be saved as raw outputs

honesty_boundary: This is a candidate ledger only. No production MR has been executed; Task 3--5 workflow results remain blocked until official runtime/checkpoints/data/API plus raw outputs and metric ledgers exist.
